title: Transcript:Lost Lover
wikitext:
{{Transcript|miniquest}}
{{Transcript list|Fabia|Xilo}}

==Two Lovers, Lost==
===Talking to Fabia===
* '''Fabia:''' I can't belive Xilo hasn't shown up.
* '''Player:''' Were you expecting to meet someone here?
* '''Fabia:''' My... friend, Xilo. I told her to meet me by the magic trees of the rainforest. We don't often have a chance to meet without a crowd of people around.
* '''Player:''' Why? Is she not particularly local to you?
* '''Fabia:''' Unfortunately not. I'm from Aldarin, but she lives in Tal Teklan. It usually takes a special event being hosted for us both to be in the same place.
* '''Player:''' So you never really get any privacy?
* '''Fabia:''' Privacy? Are you insinuating something?
* '''Player:''' Not at all. Sorry if it seemed like I was.
* '''Fabia:''' It's okay... Sorry... I just miss her.
* {{tcond|If the player has not already talked to Xilo:}}
** '''Player:''' Do you think she's just running a little late?
** '''Fabia:''' It's possible.
** '''Player:''' Could she maybe have considered another tree magical?
** '''Fabia:''' I suppose she may be where we first met... but this is where we shared our first... you know...
** '''Player:''' Well, I'll keep my fingers crossed for you. I'm sure you'll be able to find one another soon!
** '''Fabia:''' Thank you, iknami.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has already talked to Xilo:}}
** '''Player:''' Hang on... I think I might have met this Xilo.
** '''Fabia:''' You have? Where is she?
** '''Player:''' By a tree to the north of here.
** '''Fabia:''' Oh, Xilo! She's gone to where we first met instead! Thank you, iknami. I'll head over there at once!
** {{tbox|Fabia departs.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Xilo===
* '''Xilo:''' I can't believe she's done this.
* '''Player:''' Who's done this?
* '''Xilo:''' Fabia! She asked me to meet her, and I quote, 'by the special tree'. You may notice that she isn't here! I've been waiting for hours!
* '''Player:''' Do you think she might just be delayed?
* '''Xilo:''' I know her too well. She wouldn't be delayed coming to see me.
* '''Player:''' Could you be at the wrong special tree?
* '''Xilo:''' No! This is the one, singular, special tree!
* {{tcond|If the player has not already talked to Fabia:}}
** '''Player:''' Humour me for just a moment. What if, amongst this entire rainforest, there's a second very similar tree?
** '''Xilo:''' And Fabia would find herself at the wrong tree in this scenario?
** '''Player:''' Or maybe it's you who is at the wrong one?
** '''Xilo:''' No, absolutely not! I know where to meet Fabia and I wouldn't miss any opportunity to do so!
** '''Xilo:''' This was the tree where we first met. It was a lovely day! A botanical tour of the rainforest, but the only thing I found myself looking at was her...
** '''Player:''' Well, I'm sure the two of you will find each other soon. However, I do suspect that might happen sooner if you considered looking by some other trees...
** '''Xilo:''' Hmm... I'll think about it, but for now, I'll wait here a while longer.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has already talked to Fabia:}}
** '''Player:''' Hang on... I think I might have met this Fabia.
** '''Xilo:''' You have? Where is she?
** '''Player:''' South of here, by some magic trees.
** '''Xilo:''' The magic trees? Of course! How could I have been so stupid! Thank you, iknami. I'll head over right away!
** {{tbox|Xilo departs.}}
** {{tact|end}}

==Two Lovers, Found==
===Talking to Fabia or Xilo===
* '''Xilo:''' Hello again, iknami! Thank you for helping us find each other!
* '''Fabia:''' To think we were waiting by different trees! It was so silly of us!
* '''Player:''' Well, I'm happy to see you together again. Now, I'm sure you have a lot of catching up to do. I'll leave you to it.
* '''Xilo:''' Timoiva, iknami!
* {{tact|end}}
